CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(Shop__c) ,IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'CheckInSupplementary', Attendance__r.Shop__r.Account__r.Name + Attendance__r.Shop__r.Name, Attendance__r.CheckOutShop__r.Account__r.Name + Attendance__r.CheckOutShop__r.Name ) ,Shop__r.Account__r.Name + Shop__r.Name )
CustomField.label: *门店
